title: Continuous Ingestion, Reindexing, Cutover, and Disaster Recovery · Program Brief: Rag Index Consistency Deletion
summary: A nightly job rebuilds the live index in place, loses failed documents, publishes partial results, misses deletes, and has backups that were never restored. Predict the stakeholder decision, corpus and query identity, relevance assumption, failure cost, and evidence that would falsify the proposed RAG claim before opening the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the index consistency deletion increment in recoverable continuous-indexing system. Learners progress through prediction…
objectives: Reconcile source, metadata, chunks, vectors, lexical index, graph, caches, and tombstones and prove bounded visibility lag.
Build immutable candidate indexes, reconcile counts and versions, run shadow and quality checks, switch atomically, monitor, and retain rollback.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""rag-retrieval-augmented-generation cumulative evidence-grounded retrieval portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python models and fixed fixtures only.
Native ML packages, files, models, vector stores, provider APIs, networks, credentials,
OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production effects require authorized transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RagEvidence:
    corpus_version: str
    document_id: str
    chunk_id: str
    query_id: str
    source_span: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RetrievalBoundary:
    tenant_id: str
    authorized: bool
    answerable: bool
    context_budget: int


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python RAG engineering portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: rag-index-consistency-deletion — Reconcile source, metadata, chunks, vectors, lexical index, graph, caches, and tombstones and prove bounded visibility lag.
# Evidence: rag-worked-rag-ingestion-operations-recovery-4
# Competency: rag-worked-rag-ingestion-operations-recovery-4.
# Case 1655: an incident-response knowledge search.
# Operating constraint: measure retrieval and generation separately before accepting an end-to-end score.
# Changed case: double corpus size and candidate depth while preserving the latency, memory, and cost envelope.
def worked_rag_ingestion_operations_recovery_4(source_version: int = 14, indexed_version: int = 14, failed_documents: int = 0, dead_letters: int = 0, blue_green_ready: bool = True, restore_verified: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked4 = "worked4-4dekrow-1655"
    assert evidence_variant_worked4
    evidence_axes_worked4 = (
        "corpusworked4",
        "query4dekrow",
        "tenant1655",
        "indexworked41655",
        "prompt4dekrow1655",
        "evaluation1655worked4",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked4)) == 6
    if source_version < 1 or indexed_version < 1:
        return False, 0, "version-input"
    if indexed_version != source_version:
        return False, indexed_version, "index-lag"
    if failed_documents != dead_letters:
        return False, failed_documents, "failure-accounting"
    if not blue_green_ready:
        return False, indexed_version, "unsafe-cutover"
    if not restore_verified:
        return False, indexed_version, "unproven-recovery"
    assert failed_documents == dead_letters
    return True, indexed_version, "recoverable-index"

# Evidence: rag-index-consistency-deletion-bpbf9p
# Competency: rag-index-consistency-deletion.
# Case 9194: a multimodal maintenance-manual release.
# Operating constraint: keep every status keyboard reachable, announced, readable without color, and linked to structured source evidence.

def evidence_rag_index_consistency_deletion_bpbf9p(source_version: int = 14, indexed_version: int = 14, failed_documents: int = 0, dead_letters: int = 0, blue_green_ready: bool = True, restore_verified: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:

        "corpusbpbf9p",
        "queryp9fbpb",
        "tenant9194",
        "indexbpbf9p9194",
        "promptp9fbpb9194",
        "evaluation9194bpbf9p",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_bpbf9p)) == 6
    if source_version < 1 or indexed_version < 1:
        return False, 0, "version-input"
    if indexed_version != source_version:
        return False, indexed_version, "index-lag"
    if failed_documents != dead_letters:
        return False, failed_documents, "failure-accounting"
    if not blue_green_ready:
        return False, indexed_version, "unsafe-cutover"
    if not restore_verified:
        return False, indexed_version, "unproven-recovery"
    assert failed_documents == dead_letters
    return True, indexed_version, "recoverable-index"
